rag_rules: Keep type-level AGREE contract declarations on component type owners; keep implementation-only bindings on implementation owners.
Subcomponent-port references are not valid in a component type annex unless they are exposed through a valid declaration.
generic_rules: Choose an owner that preserves visibility of every referenced identifier.
Add the annex within the existing owner without changing unrelated features, subcomponents, connections, or property associations.
If the owner already has an AGREE annex, merge into that owner-level annex structure rather than duplicating surrounding AADL content.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Wrap inserted content as annex agree {** ... **};
anti_patterns: Do not move contract text to an owner where referenced names go out of scope.
Do not rewrite, reorder, or delete unrelated AADL declarations while fusing the annex.
irrelevant_topics: Validator repair rules about property names or unresolved AGREE identifiers
